# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Test

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup .NET Core SDK
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v1
        with:
          dotnet-version: '3.1'

      - name: Run custom build commands
        env:
          BUILD_COMMANDS: ${{ inputs.build_commands }}
        run: |
          echo "Running build commands:"
          eval "$BUILD_COMMANDS"

inputs:
  build_commands:
    description: 'Custom shell command(s) to run during the build process'
    required: true
